message:
🧹 Deduplicate isPodHealthy into shared lib/k8s.ts (#10207)

Extract identical isPodHealthy() logic from 5 multi-tenancy card helpers
into lib/k8s.ts with a generic { status?: string; ready?: string } interface.

All 5 copies had the same body: lowercase status, check 'running', parse
ready ratio via parseReadyCount, verify ready === total.

Files updated:
- lib/k8s.ts: added isPodHealthy()
- k3s-status/helpers.ts: re-export from lib/k8s
- kubeflex-status/helpers.ts: re-export from lib/k8s
- kubevirt-status/helpers.ts: re-export from lib/k8s
- ovn-status/helpers.ts: re-export from lib/k8s
- k3s-status/useK3sStatus.ts: import from lib/k8s, call isPodHealthy(pod)

Fixes #10203

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

+import { parseReadyCount, isPodHealthy } from '../../../../lib/k8s'

 /**
  * Extract VM state from a virt-launcher pod's status.

@@ -15,3 +15,15 @@ export function parseReadyCount(ready?: string): { ready: number; total: number
     total: Number.isFinite(totalCount) ? totalCount : 0,
   }
 }
+
+/**
+ * Determine whether a pod is healthy based on its status and ready ratio.
+ * Accepts any object with optional `status` and `ready` fields.
+ */
+export function isPodHealthy(pod: { status?: string; ready?: string }): boolean {
+  const status = (pod.status ?? '').toLowerCase()
+  if (status !== 'running') return false
+
+  const { ready, total } = parseReadyCount(pod.ready)
+  return total > 0 && ready === total
+}
